canonical_sl.raw_input: Procesna temperatura narašča; izberi javno možnost ob omejenem času, finančni izgubi in nasprotujočem senzorju.

evidence.content: Procesna temperatura je v zadnjih šestih minutah narasla za 11 °C.
Rezervni senzor kaže vrednost 8 °C nižje od primarnega senzorja; pravilnost obeh odčitkov je neznana.
Nadaljnje segrevanje lahko poškoduje opremo, nadzorovan shutdown pa povzroči finančno izgubo.
Strukturirani prizor kaže naraščajoči merilnik temperature, oranžno opozorilno luč in nepoškodovano procesno opremo.

options.label: Takojšen nadzorovan shutdown
options.description: Ustavi proizvodnjo po nadzorovanem postopku.

options.label: Kratko preverjanje
options.description: Za največ tri minute preveri oba senzorja in nato ponovno odloči.

options.label: Nadaljevanje proizvodnje
options.description: Nadaljuj proizvodnjo pri trenutnih nastavitvah.

constraints.text: Odločitev mora biti sprejeta v treh minutah.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, kateri senzor je pravilen.
Ni znano, ali je že nastala poškodba opreme.

operational_en.raw_input: Process temperature is rising; choose one public option under limited time, financial loss, and conflicting sensor data.

evidence.content: Process temperature rose by 11 C during the last six minutes.
A backup sensor reads 8 C below the primary sensor; which reading is correct is unknown.
Further heating can damage equipment, while a controlled shutdown causes financial loss.
The structured scene shows a rising temperature gauge, an amber warning light, and intact process equipment.

options.label: Immediate controlled shutdown
options.description: Plan and execute the controlled shutdown procedure immediately.

options.label: Brief verification
options.description: Verify both sensors for no more than three minutes and then decide again.

options.label: Continue production
options.description: Proceed with production at the current settings.

constraints.text: A decision must be made within three minutes.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: Which sensor is correct is unknown.
Whether equipment damage has already occurred is unknown.

timelines: The decision window is three minutes.

time: The observed rise covers six minutes.
The decision window is three minutes.
rules: Retain explicit unknowns and compare consequences without inventing sensor reliability.

desired_scenes: stable gauge, intact machinery, and a clear operator position
broken_scenes: damaged equipment beneath a red warning field
social_identity_motifs: operator responsible for a shared process

cue_bindings.cue: which reading is correct is unknown
cue_bindings.cited_text: which reading is correct is unknown

canonical_sl.raw_input: Ponudba za delo prinaša višji prihodek in selitev daleč od družine; izberi med selitvijo, pogajanjem za hibrid in zavrnitvijo.

evidence.content: Ponudba zviša letni neto prihodek za približno 28 odstotkov.
Selitev bi povečala razdaljo do družine na približno 900 kilometrov.
Bližnji sorodnik trenutno prejema pomoč dvakrat tedensko.
Strukturirani prizor kaže dve oddaljeni lokaciji, družinsko mizo in odprt načrt novega stanovanja.

options.label: Selitev
options.description: Sprejmi ponudbo in se preseli na novo lokacijo.

options.label: Pogajanje za hibrid
options.description: Pred odločitvijo se pogajaj za hibridno ureditev.

options.label: Zavrnitev
options.description: Zavrni ponudbo in ostani na sedanji lokaciji.

constraints.text: Delodajalec zahteva odgovor v sedmih dneh.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo delodajalec sprejel hibridno ureditev.
Ni znano, kdo bi po selitvi prevzel pomoč sorodniku.

operational_en.raw_input: A job offer brings higher income and a move far from family; choose among moving, negotiating hybrid work, and declining.

evidence.content: The offer raises annual net income by about 28 percent.
The move would increase the distance from family to about 900 kilometres.
A close relative currently receives help twice each week.
The structured scene shows two distant locations, a family table, and an open plan for a new apartment.

options.label: Move
options.description: Accept the offer and move to the new location.

options.label: Negotiate hybrid work
options.description: Connect both locations by negotiating a hybrid arrangement before deciding.

options.label: Decline
options.description: Decline the offer and stay at the current location.

constraints.text: The employer requires an answer within seven days.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: Whether the employer will accept a hybrid arrangement is unknown.
Who would provide the relative's help after a move is unknown.

timelines: The reply window is seven days.

time: The employer requires an answer within seven days.
rules: Compare income, distance, care logistics, and reversibility while retaining unknowns.

visual_memories: occupied family table and familiar home
desired_scenes: continued connection beside an open future horizon
broken_scenes: empty chair at the family table and a closed route
social_identity_motifs: family member and worker in two locations

canonical_sl.raw_input: Delujoč, vendar nepopoln prototip je pred odločitvijo o javni beti, zasebnem pilotu ali popolni preložitvi.

evidence.content: Prototip dokonča 87 odstotkov glavnih delovnih tokov brez napake.
Dve znani napaki lahko uporabniku izbrišeta neshranjene osnutke.
Konkurent je napovedal soroden izdelek čez šest tednov.
Strukturirani prizor kaže delujoč vmesnik, dva označena preloma in prazno polje za uporabniški odziv.
Vpliv napak na ugled ni znan.

options.label: Javni beta launch
options.description: Odpri javno beto z objavljenim seznamom znanih napak.

options.label: Omejeni zasebni pilot
options.description: Izvedi omejeni pilot z vnaprej izbranimi uporabniki.

options.label: Popolna preložitev
options.description: Preloži vse zunanje testiranje do odprave znanih napak.

constraints.text: Znane napake morajo biti razkrite vsakemu udeležencu.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, koliko uporabnega feedbacka bi dala javna beta.
Ni znan obseg morebitne škode ugledu.

operational_en.raw_input: A working but incomplete prototype faces a choice among public beta, a private pilot, and complete delay.

evidence.content: The prototype completes 87 percent of its main workflows without error.
Two known defects can erase a user's unsaved drafts.
A competitor announced a related product in six weeks.
The structured scene shows a working interface, two marked breaks, and an empty field for user response.
The reputation impact is unknown.

options.label: Public beta launch
options.description: Proceed with a public beta and publish the known-defect list.

options.label: Limited private pilot
options.description: Verify the prototype with a limited set of preselected users.

options.label: Complete delay
options.description: Plan no external testing until the known defects are fixed.

constraints.text: Known defects must be disclosed to every participant.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: How much useful feedback a public beta would produce is unknown.
The extent of possible reputation damage is unknown.

timelines: The competitor's announced horizon is six weeks.

time: The competitor announced a six-week horizon.
rules: Compare learning access, defect exposure, timing, and reversibility without assuming user reaction.

desired_scenes: coherent interface surrounded by visible user response
broken_scenes: fragmented interface and an empty audience field
motor_patterns: show it to a bounded group

canonical_sl.raw_input: Prijatelj potrebuje večjo vsoto, vendar je že zamujal z vračili; izberi polno posojilo, omejeno posojilo s pogodbo ali zavrnitev.

evidence.content: Prijatelj je predložil račun za nujno popravilo doma.
Dve prejšnji vračili sta zamujali več kot tri mesece.
Polna zahtevana vsota predstavlja 45 odstotkov lastne denarne rezerve.
Strukturirani prizor kaže račun za popravilo, dva človeka za mizo in zmanjšujoč se prikaz denarne rezerve.

options.label: Polno posojilo
options.description: Posodi celotno zahtevano vsoto brez nove pogodbe.

options.label: Omejeno posojilo s pogodbo
options.description: Posodi omejeno vsoto z zapisanim rokom vračila.

options.label: Zavrnitev
options.description: Ne posodi denarja.

constraints.text: Za odločitev ni na voljo dodatnega vira denarja.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo prijatelj novo posojilo vrnil pravočasno.
Ni znano, kako bo posamezna možnost vplivala na odnos.

operational_en.raw_input: A friend needs a large sum but has repaid late before; choose a full loan, a limited loan with a contract, or decline.

evidence.content: The friend provided an invoice for an urgent home repair.
Two previous repayments were more than three months late.
The full requested sum is 45 percent of the lender's cash reserve.
The structured scene shows a repair invoice, two people at a table, and a shrinking cash-reserve display.

options.label: Full loan
options.description: Spend the full requested sum without a new contract.

options.label: Limited loan with contract
options.description: Spend a limited sum under a written repayment date.

options.label: Decline
options.description: Save the cash reserve and lend no money.

constraints.text: No additional source of money is available for this decision.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: Whether the friend would repay a new loan on time is unknown.
How each option would affect the relationship is unknown.

time: Two previous repayments exceeded three months of delay.
rules: Compare documented need, repayment history, reserve exposure, and contractual limits without inferring motive.

visual_memories: two people facing each other across a table
desired_scenes: continued connection with a stable reserve display
broken_scenes: empty chair beside a depleted reserve display
social_identity_motifs: friend and lender at one table
motor_patterns: write and pass a smaller amount

canonical_sl.raw_input: Žival je ujeta ob nestabilnem pobočju; izberi neposreden vstop, poskus z razdalje ali čakanje na pomoč.

evidence.content: Žival je vidna na polici približno šest metrov pod opazovalcem.
S pobočja se ob premiku kamenja sproščajo manjši delci, kar predstavlja fizično nevarnost.
Na voljo sta desetmetrska vrv in zanka, ki ju je mogoče uporabiti s stabilne ploščadi.
Usposobljena pomoč je sporočila prihod čez približno sedem minut.
Strukturirani prizor kaže žival na polici, drobljivo pobočje, stabilno ploščad in navito vrv.

options.label: Neposreden vstop
options.description: Stopi na pobočje in se približaj živali.

options.label: Poskus z razdalje
options.description: S stabilne ploščadi uporabi vrv in zanko.

options.label: Čakanje na pomoč
options.description: Ostani na ploščadi in počakaj na usposobljeno pomoč.

constraints.text: Žival mora ostati v vidnem polju.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo pobočje ostalo stabilno naslednjih sedem minut.
Ni znano, ali je žival poškodovana.

operational_en.raw_input: An animal is trapped beside an unstable slope; choose direct entry, an attempt from a distance, or waiting for help.

evidence.content: The animal is visible on a ledge about six metres below the observer.
Small fragments fall from the slope when rocks shift, creating physical danger.
A ten-metre rope and loop are available for use from a stable platform.
Trained help reported an arrival time of about seven minutes.
The structured scene shows an animal on a ledge, a crumbling slope, a stable platform, and a coiled rope.

options.label: Direct entry
options.description: Approach the animal by stepping onto the slope.

options.label: Attempt from a distance
options.description: Protect the stable position while using the rope and loop.

options.label: Wait for help
options.description: Avoid entering the slope and wait on the platform for trained help.

constraints.text: The animal must remain in view.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: Whether the slope will remain stable for the next seven minutes is unknown.
Whether the animal is injured is unknown.

timelines: Trained help reported an arrival time of about seven minutes.

time: Trained help reported an arrival time of about seven minutes.
rules: Compare exposure, tool reach, delay, and uncertain slope stability without inferring injury.

visual_memories: animal isolated on a narrow ledge
desired_scenes: animal and observer on stable ground with open space
social_identity_motifs: observer oriented toward a vulnerable animal

canonical_sl.raw_input: Sodelavec si na sestanku prisvoji zasluge; izberi javno konfrontacijo, zasebno predstavitev dokazov ali opustitev odziva.

evidence.content: Sodelavec je na sestanku izjavil, da je sam zasnoval predstavljeno rešitev.
Časovno označen zapis repozitorija kaže avtorstvo druge osebe pred prispevkom sodelavca.
Vodja je prisoten in sestanek še poteka.
Strukturirani prizor kaže govorca ob projekciji, vodjo za mizo in časovno označen zapis na prenosniku.
Socialne posledice javne konfrontacije niso znane.

options.label: Takojšnja javna konfrontacija
options.description: Takoj na sestanku izpodbij izjavo in pokaži zapis.

options.label: Zasebna predstavitev dokazov
options.description: Po sestanku zasebno predstavi zapis vodji.

options.label: Opustitev odziva
options.description: Ne predstavi zapisa in ne odpiraj vprašanja zaslug.

constraints.text: Uporabiti je dovoljeno samo obstoječi časovno označeni zapis.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, kakšne socialne posledice bi imela javna konfrontacija.
Ni znano, kako bo vodja ocenil dokaz.

operational_en.raw_input: A colleague claims credit during a meeting; choose public confrontation, private presentation of evidence, or no response.

evidence.content: During the meeting, the colleague said that they alone designed the presented solution.
A timestamped repository record shows another person's authorship before the colleague's contribution.
The leader is present and the meeting is still in progress.
The structured scene shows a speaker beside a projection, a leader at the table, and a timestamped record on a laptop.
The social consequences of public confrontation are unknown.

options.label: Immediate public confrontation
options.description: Proceed now by challenging the statement and displaying the record in the meeting.

options.label: Private presentation of evidence
options.description: Verify the record privately with the leader after the meeting.

options.label: No response
options.description: Plan no follow-up and do not present the record.

constraints.text: Only the existing timestamped record may be used.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: The social consequences of public confrontation are unknown.
How the leader would assess the evidence is unknown.

timelines: The meeting is still in progress.

time: The meeting is still in progress.
rules: Compare evidence visibility, timing, and unknown social consequences without inferring either person's motive.

visual_memories: one speaker centered beside shared work
desired_scenes: authorship record visible with balanced positions at the table
broken_scenes: one figure erased from the shared-work composition
social_identity_motifs: author, colleague, leader, and observing group

cue_bindings.cue: social consequences of public confrontation are unknown
cue_bindings.cited_text: social consequences of public confrontation are unknown

canonical_sl.raw_input: Redka priložnost za privlačno, nepovratno potovanje predstavlja opazen del prostega proračuna; izberi rezervacijo, lokalno alternativo ali ostanek doma.

evidence.content: Ponudba za potovanje poteče čez štiri ure in po rezervaciji ni vračljiva.
Strošek potovanja predstavlja 38 odstotkov trenutno prostega proračuna.
Ista pot je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Strukturirani prizor kaže oddaljeno obalo, vozovnico z rokom in bližnjo lokalno pot.

options.label: Rezervacija
options.description: Rezerviraj nepovratno potovanje.

options.label: Cenejša lokalna alternativa
options.description: Izberi cenejši lokalni izlet.

options.label: Ostati doma
options.description: Ne rezerviraj izleta in ostani doma.

constraints.text: Oddaljeno potovanje po rezervaciji ni vračljivo.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, kako zadovoljivo bi bilo potovanje.

operational_en.raw_input: A rare, attractive, non-refundable trip uses a noticeable share of discretionary budget; choose booking, a local alternative, or staying home.

evidence.content: The travel offer expires in four hours and is non-refundable after booking.
The trip cost is 38 percent of the currently discretionary budget.
The same route was available once during the last three years.
The structured scene shows a distant coast, a ticket with a deadline, and a nearby local route.

options.label: Book the trip
options.description: Buy the non-refundable trip.

options.label: Cheaper local alternative
options.description: Spend a smaller amount on a local trip.

options.label: Stay home
options.description: Save the discretionary budget and stay home.

constraints.text: The distant trip is non-refundable after booking.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
How satisfying the trip would be is unknown.

timelines: The offer expires in four hours.

time: The offer expires in four hours.
rules: Compare rarity, irreversibility, budget exposure, and unknown future costs without assuming enjoyment.

desired_scenes: expanded horizon with vivid movement and retained footing
broken_scenes: closed horizon beside an emptied budget marker

canonical_sl.raw_input: Bližnja oseba se več ur ne odziva; izberi eno nevtralno preverjanje, ponavljajoče klicanje ali čakanje do dogovorjenega časa.

evidence.content: Od zadnjega sporočila so minile štiri ure.
Oseba običajno odgovori v dveh urah, vendar je že prej med delom odgovorila pozneje.
Razlog za neodzivnost ni znan; ni sporočila, dogodka ali drugega dokaza o nevarnosti.
Strukturirani prizor kaže eno neodgovorjeno sporočilo, uro in nespremenjen dogovorjeni čas.

options.label: Eno nevtralno preverjanje
options.description: Pošlji eno nevtralno sporočilo brez dodatnega klica.

options.label: Ponavljajoče klicanje
options.description: Večkrat pokliči v kratkih presledkih.

options.label: Čakanje do dogovorjenega časa
options.description: Ne pošiljaj novega sporočila in počakaj do dogovorjenega časa.

constraints.text: Trenutno ni dodatnega vira informacij.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

unknowns.text: Razlog za neodzivnost ni znan.
Ni znano, ali odstopanje od običajnega vzorca pomeni nevarnost.

operational_en.raw_input: A close person has not responded for several hours; choose one neutral check, repeated calling, or waiting until the agreed time.

evidence.content: Four hours have passed since the last message.
The person usually responds within two hours but has previously responded later while working.
The reason for the silence is unknown; there is no message, event, or other evidence of danger.
The structured scene shows one unanswered message, a clock, and an unchanged agreed time.

options.label: One neutral check
options.description: Clarify contact status with one neutral message and no additional call.

options.label: Repeated calling
options.description: Proceed with repeated calls at short intervals.

options.label: Wait until the agreed time
options.description: Plan no new message and wait until the agreed time.

constraints.text: No additional source of information is currently available.
Only the three public options may be used.

unknowns.text: The reason for the silence is unknown.
Whether the deviation from the usual pattern indicates danger is unknown.

timelines: Four hours have passed since the last message.

time: Four hours have passed since the last message.
rules: Compare information gain, intrusion, delay, and the absence of danger evidence without inventing a cause.

visual_memories: two connected figures with a quiet message line
desired_scenes: restored connection with open space around both figures
broken_scenes: one isolated figure beneath a dense cluster of alerts
